headline: How Washingtons tag on Chinas CATL could affect Tesla

CATL, the worlds largest battery maker, is a major supplier of lithium iron phosphate (LFP) batteries to Tesla for its Shanghai factory, the U.S. automakers largest.  Tesla has been exporting these cars equipped with CATL batteries to other markets such as Europe and Canada.
